html:
The Green Gem is an item used to craft two Ancient items. It can be used to craft the Construction Amulet, which raises Sanity as well as halves the resource cost of crafting items, and the Deconstruction Staff, which can be used to destroy structures/items and receive all of the resources used in their construction (barring Gems).

Green Gems can be inserted into Cratered Moonrocks to acquire a Green Moonlens. They can also be used to power Winona's G.E.M.erator.

Gathering

Green Gems can be obtained by mining Ancient Statues, destroying Broken Clockworks, opening Ornate Chests, and hammering Ancient Pseudoscience Stations in the Ruins. They can also be gathered from Cave Holes by using The Lazy Forager. The Ruins can be regenerated by killing the Ancient Fuelweaver, allowing the player to obtain new gems each time the boss is defeated.

Additional ways to acquire Green Gems are:

  • The Dragonfly drops 1–2 Green Gems upon death.
  • Spazmatism can be killed every 15 days for a guaranteed Green Gem.
  • Boulderboughs planted in the Ruins or the Fumarole Biome have a chance to grow Green Gems.
  • Geode Fruits have roughly a 2.4% chance to yield a Green Gem when heated.
  • The Large Ornate Chest has a chance to contain Green Gems each time the Ancient Guardian is killed.
  • Sunken Chests have a chance to drop Green Gems when hammered.
  • The Table and Chair Relics have roughly a 0.2% chance to drop Green Gems when destroyed.
  • Tumbleweeds have a 0.02% chance to drop Green Gems when harvested.
  • Each segment of a defeated Great Depths Worm has a chance to drop a Green Gem.
  • Wilson can transmute Green Gems by using 3 Yellow Gems with the Transmute Gems III skill.
  • Green Gems can be obtained from presents under a Winter's Feast Tree (only during Winter's Feast).

Usage

×3

×2

×2

×2

×4

Obtained by inserting the Gem into the Cratered Moonrock.

Tips

Because Green Gems are renewable, the items it can be crafted into can be utilized to make nearly any other item in the game renewable, by crafting something with the amulet at half-price and then deconstructing it with the Deconstruction Staff for a full return.

Trivia

  • The Green Gem uses the Red Gem's texture, only flipped and colored green.

Gallery

  • Gems emoji from official Klei Discord server.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord

–Wormwood

–Winona

–Wortox
“Like this stone, florp.”
–Wurt
“It's a great green gem!”
–Walter
“If only I could've gotten my hands on one of these before... well never mind.”
–Wanda
